context.usage: Displays relationship tier text at top-center.

acceptance_criteria: Label asset is exactly 80x8px with a 1px border in #1D2B53.
Interior is filled with #FFF1E8 and supports rendering up to 14 characters using 3x5 glyphs in #1D2B53.
When placed at top-center with 4px y offset, it remains inside the 128x128 canvas and leaves the bottom HUD row (y=127) unobstructed.

reference_images.label: relationship_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Bond progression label, unlock pacing, and relationship feedback anchor.

reference_images.label: hud_widget_doc
reference_images.purpose: Bottom HUD layout, care popup placement, and touch-safe spacing anchor.

reference_images.label: art_direction_doc
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art palette, silhouette, and warm interior mood anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for ui asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/relationship_label.png through AssetServer and store the handle under relationship_label.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI sprites in screen space inside the 128x128 logical canvas and clamp to whole pixels before render.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
